justification: All six pass criteria met: (1) Chain timeout violation identified — OrderService retry budget 6s > CartService 5s timeout explicitly called out with arithmetic. (2) Missing circuit breaker on CartService→OrderService identified as a ship-blocker. (3) PaymentService 8s gateway timeout > CartService 5s timeout identified as orphaned/ghost charge risk. (4) Dual-write/partial completion risk thoroughly covered — order created without payment, payment taken without order confirmation. (5) Saga/compensation pattern recommended along with pending-order reaper job alternative. (6) Verdict is NOT READY.

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough chain-level analysis — never falls into the trap of reviewing services individually
Ghost charge scenario explained with concrete timeline (gateway responds at 5-8s after CartService has already timed out)
Goes beyond rubric requirements — identifies missing idempotency keys, double-reserve stock risk, and missing circuit breaker on PaymentService→ExternalGateway
Operability review is strong — calls out impossibility of debugging at 3am without correlation IDs or distributed tracing
Provides concrete fix values (e.g., reduce InventoryService timeout to 2s so 2×2=4s < 5s) rather than vague recommendations
Appropriate escalation routing to MJ for architecture decisions and Bird for business/compliance impact
Prioritized recommendations clearly separated into ship-blockers vs operational safety vs nice-to-haves
